faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in White Plains typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and number of treatments needed. Minor infestations in smaller homes start around $350, while extensive colonies in larger properties or multiple structures can cost up to $2,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all White Plains customers.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have carpenter ants in my White Plains home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include piles of sawdust-like wood shavings near baseboards or windowsills, rustling sounds inside walls, large black ants (especially near moisture sources), and visible winged ants during spring. White Plains homes with older wood siding, deck structures, or moisture issues are particularly vulnerable. Our technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm carpenter ant activity and locate nests.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in White Plains?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout White Plains and Westchester County for carpenter ant emergencies. Our team understands that carpenter ants cause progressive structural damage, so we prioritize rapid response. Most White Plains customers can schedule an inspection within 24 hours of their initial call.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ant treatments safe for my White Plains home and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children, pets, and the environment when applied by our licensed professionals. Our targeted approach focuses treatments on nest sites and entry points rather than broad chemical application. We provide detailed safety instructions and work around your schedule to minimize any disruption to your White Plains household.
